tracks.rawText: 2:13dsdv5.5CoverEpic ska with threatening romantic tension: percussive acoustic guitar la pompe on crisp offbeats, upright bass walking on 1 and 3, lead acoustic guitar firing rapid chromatic runs and arpeggios, saxophone melody in the foreground, violin with staccato phrases and glissando slides, sudden rhythmic stops, syncopated accents, and a lead guitar solo drenched in heavy vibratoPublishRemix
tracks.title: dsd

tracks.rawText: 3:25Studio Selectionv5.5Coversoulful R&B ballad inspired by Alicia Keys, emotional piano chords, live drums, gospel choir harmonies, jazzy electric bass, and warm analog tone, strong, soulful female vocals full of emotion and power — a mix between Fallin’ and Girl on Fire — singing about inner strength, rebirth, and love, dynamic, cinematic energy, uplifting outro with choir and stringsAliciakePublishRemix

tracks.rawText: 4:58Amanati - Mohë Mohë - Official Video [eb_E1UeywWQ]v5.5CoverEpic cinematic psytrance track at 145 BPM with powerful prehispanic Mexican tribal influences, Highly rhythmic, hypnotic and energetic with long, evolving and emotional loops that build intensity over time, Dominant and expressive ancient prehispanic flutes like quena and ocarina, with powerful melodic leads, fast arpeggios, call-and-response phrases and rich layered harmonies, Deep rolling psytrance bassline and punchy kick driving the track forward, Strong tribal percussion including huehuetl and teponaztli with complex rhythmic patterns, Add cinematic choir elements with wide, atmospheric, emotional and epic vocal layers, creating a sacred and transcendental feeling, Rich psychedelic sound design with delays, reverbs and spatial movement, Jungle ambience, wind, mystical textures and ritual chanting elements, The track should feel like a massive ancient ceremony turned into a cinematic experience, magical, epic, spiritual, hypnotic and full of energy, with powerful emotionalPublishRemix
tracks.title: Amanati - Mohë Mohë - Official Video [eb_E1UeywWQ]

tracks.rawText: 5:04Amanati - Mohë Mohë - Official Video [eb_E1UeywWQ]v5.5CoverEpic cinematic psytrance track at 145 BPM with powerful prehispanic Mexican tribal influences, Highly rhythmic, hypnotic and energetic with long, evolving and emotional loops that build intensity over time, Dominant and expressive ancient prehispanic flutes like quena and ocarina, with powerful melodic leads, fast arpeggios, call-and-response phrases and rich layered harmonies, Deep rolling psytrance bassline and punchy kick driving the track forward, Strong tribal percussion including huehuetl and teponaztli with complex rhythmic patterns, Add cinematic choir elements with wide, atmospheric, emotional and epic vocal layers, creating a sacred and transcendental feeling, Rich psychedelic sound design with delays, reverbs and spatial movement, Jungle ambience, wind, mystical textures and ritual chanting elements, The track should feel like a massive ancient ceremony turned into a cinematic experience, magical, epic, spiritual, hypnotic and full of energy, with powerful emotionalPublishRemix
tracks.title: Amanati - Mohë Mohë - Official Video [eb_E1UeywWQ]

tracks.rawText: 4:33Amanati - Mohë Mohë - Official Video [eb_E1UeywWQ]v5.5CoverDark conceptual ritual track with deep emotional weight, slow and hypnotic, minimalistic and organic rather than electronic, Features acoustic tribal elements like plucked strings and subtle percussion, with a distant low drone and soft sub-bass, Male vocals are fragile, tired, almost breaking, with emotional cracks, whispering, chanting and melancholic vibrato, The atmosphere feels empty, lonely and introspective, like a spiritual collapse or inner void, Very spacious mix with long reverbs, echoing silence, and slow evolution, No aggressive drums, only subtle pulses, The track should feel like a personal ritual of sadness, beautiful but painful, immersive and hauntingPublishRemix
tracks.title: Amanati - Mohë Mohë - Official Video [eb_E1UeywWQ]

tracks.rawText: 4:29Amanati - Mohë Mohë - Official Video [eb_E1UeywWQ]v5.5CoverDark conceptual ritual track with deep emotional weight, slow and hypnotic, minimalistic and organic rather than electronic, Features acoustic tribal elements like plucked strings and subtle percussion, with a distant low drone and soft sub-bass, Male vocals are fragile, tired, almost breaking, with emotional cracks, whispering, chanting and melancholic vibrato, The atmosphere feels empty, lonely and introspective, like a spiritual collapse or inner void, Very spacious mix with long reverbs, echoing silence, and slow evolution, No aggressive drums, only subtle pulses, The track should feel like a personal ritual of sadness, beautiful but painful, immersive and hauntingPublishRemix
tracks.title: Amanati - Mohë Mohë - Official Video [eb_E1UeywWQ]

tracks.rawText: 3:13Amanati - Mohë Mohë - Official Video [eb_E1UeywWQ]v5.5CoverElectronic epic fusing Baul tradition with heavyweight hip-hop: rhythmic ektara drone and dotara riff over sub-bass swells, then a punchy kick-snare grid, trap hats, and deep 808 lows, Traditional male Baul vocals soar with melisma, low-pass ektara bridge, spoken-word break, huge percussion, wide delays, and dark reverbPublishRemix
tracks.title: Amanati - Mohë Mohë - Official Video [eb_E1UeywWQ]
